	mov R2, #0A0h	; 160  -96
	mov R1, #3Dh	;  61 '='
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A0FD
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #10h	;  16
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A1FA
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	ret

	lcall jump_4589
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R4, A
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov 82h, A
	mov 83h, R4
	ret

	lcall jump_0859
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A230
	lcall jump_086C
	mov R7, #00h	;   0
	ret

	mov A, #05h	;   5
	add A, R6
	mov 82h, A
	clr A
	addc A, #0FCh	; 252   -4 'ü'
	mov 83h, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov A, #21h	;  33 '!'
	add A, R7
	mov 82h, A
	clr A
	addc A, #0FCh	; 252   -4 'ü'
	mov 83h, A
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov A, R7
	rrc A
	rrc A
	rrc A
	anl A, #1Fh	;  31
	mov R6, A
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	mov R7, A
	ret

	mov R7, #84h	; 132 -124
	mov R6, #08h	;   8
	lcall jump_56AF
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A21A
	ret

	mov R4, A
	mov A, 56h
	clr C
	rrc A
	mov R6, A
	mov A, 57h
	rrc A
	mov R7, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0557
	mov A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A2E2
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A2E0
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movc A, @A + DPTR
	subb A, 55h
	clr A
	movc A, @A + DPTR
	subb A, 54h
	ret

	mov R6, A
	anl A, #20h	;  32 ' '
	mov R5, A
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #0DFh	; 223  -33 'ß'
	orl A, R5
	mov R7, A
	ret

	lcall jump_4589
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R3, A
	clr A
	mov R5, A
	inc R7
	ret

	mov R7, #30h	;  48 '0'
jump_7C5F:
	mov R6, #09h	;   9
	lcall jump_374D
	clr A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_041E
; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	7C68h
jump_7C68:
	dec R7

org	7C69h
	mov A, #20h	;  32 ' '

org	7C6Bh
	movx @DPTR, A

org	7C6Ch
	mov R7, #01h	;   1

org	7C6Eh
	ret


org	7C6Fh
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A03E

org	7C72h
	movx A, @DPTR
jump_7C73:
	mov DPTR, #jump_0572
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	anl A, #01h	;   1
	swap A
	rlc A
	rlc A
	rlc A
	anl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A1FA
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A1FE
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	mov 0F0h, #0Bh	;  11
	ret

	mov 0F0h, #0Eh	;  14
	mov A, 54h
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A0B1
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_8100
	lcall jump_4589
	mov A, R7
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov A, 68h
	anl A, #7Fh	; 127
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A298
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_04DF
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_9FD4
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A04F
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0DFh	; 223  -33 'ß'
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	ret

	mov R7, #4Eh	;  78 'N'
	lcall jump_46AA
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #7Fh	; 127
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A2C2
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, #48h	;  72 'H'
	mov R6, #09h	;   9
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A04C
	movx A, @DPTR
	swap A
	rrc A
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	ret

	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R7, #10h	;  16
	mov R6, #00h	;   0
	ljmp jump_3E4F

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0609
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F8h	; 248   -8 'ø'
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0603
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #7Fh	; 127
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov R5, #02h	;   2
	mov R7, #02h	;   2
	ljmp jump_5FB8

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #6Fh	; 111 'o'
	mov R7, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_9FDE
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_9FDE
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #jump_0572
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A0DE
	lcall jump_4589
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_8906
	lcall jump_4589
	movx A, @DPTR
	ret

	mov R5, A
	mov R4, #00h	;   0
	lcall jump_0702
	mov A, R7
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0005
	lcall jump_07AA
	add A, R7
	ret

	mov R7, A
	mov A, R6
	anl A, R4
	mov R6, A
	mov A, R7
	anl A, R5
	orl A, R6
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_04FF
	mov A, #1Ch	;  28
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	ret

	anl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	mov R6, A
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #7Fh	; 127
	orl A, R6
	ret

jump_7D4A:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A287
	lcall jump_4571
	mov A, R7
	ret

	lcall jump_4571
	mov A, R7
	orl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	mov R7, A
	ret

	add A, R7
	mov R0, A
	mov A, @R0
	mov R6, A
	mov A, R5
	cpl A
	anl A, R6
	ret

	lcall jump_46AA
	mov A, R7
	orl A, #40h	;  64 '@'
	mov R5, A
	ret

	orl A, #0C7h	; 199  -57 'Ç'

end
